---
title: "Resources"
# page-layout: full
format: 
  html:
    css: ../../styles/flipgrid.css
    freeze: true
    sidebar: false
    toc: false
---


```{=html}
<div class="flip-grid">

  <a href="/pages/resources/dandelion.html" class="flip-card">
    <div class="flip-inner">
      <div class="flip-front">
        <img src="/content/dandelion_logo.png" alt="dandelion">
      </div>
      <div class="flip-back">
        <h3>dandelion</h3>
        <p>R-Package documentation.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="/pages/resources/VirtualEnvs.html" class="flip-card">
    <div class="flip-inner">
      <div class="flip-front">
        <img src="/content/gchm/clean_lines.png" alt="Lines">
      </div>
      <div class="flip-back">
        <h3>Virtual environments</h3>
        <p>Setup and Application.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </a>
  
  <a href="/pages/resources/fieldnotes.html" class="flip-card">
    <div class="flip-inner">
      <div class="flip-front">
        <img src="/content/chinstrap_watercol.png" alt="Penguins">
      </div>
      <div class="flip-back">
        <h3>Field Notes</h3>
        <p>Experimental Collection.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="/pages/CV.html" class="flip-card">
    <div class="flip-inner">
      <div class="flip-front">
        <img src="/content/red-cat.jpg" alt="Cats">
      </div>
      <div class="flip-back">
        <h3>Cat Vitae</h3>
        <p>The live of a scientific cat.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>
```
